name: hermes-kafka-connector
title: ServiceNow Hermes Kafka Connector
description:
Kafka Connect sink and source connectors that bridge a ServiceNow
instance Hermes Kafka cluster with Confluent Cloud using mutual TLS
(mTLS) authentication. The sink streams records from Confluent Cloud
into Hermes; the source streams records from Hermes (including its
paired peer clusters) into Confluent Cloud. Enables real-time,
bidirectional data movement between ServiceNow workflows and Confluent
Cloud without requiring VPN or PrivateLink. Supports pass-through
bytes (ByteArrayConverter), full header preservation, and hash-by-key
partitioning on the sink. Requires an mTLS certificate from the
ServiceNow Instance PKI Certificate Generator.
requirements: mTLS certificate from Instance PKI Certificate Generator
ServiceNow instance with Hermes Messaging Service activated
